response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist with 20+ years of experience, genuine scale exposure (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic), and current AI-tooling work that matches the AI-velocity preference. However, the role is a Principal IC6 centered on experimentation, growth measurement, telemetry, and statistical analysis — and the resume shows essentially no experimentation platform, feature-flagging, metrics infrastructure, or growth engineering experience. His career has been at small companies and startups in senior/staff full-stack roles, with no evidence of the multi-workstream, cross-org platform leadership this principal role demands, and his deepest specialization (DLang, testing tools, GIS) is orthogonal to the domain.
strengths: 20+ years of broad engineering experience with strong software-craftsmanship fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks)
Real high-scale, low-latency production experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests per second)
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, aligning with the AI-accelerated engineering preference
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of this role
No demonstrated data/statistics depth in metrics, telemetry pipelines, or experimental analysis
Career scope is senior/staff at small companies; no evidence of principal-level, multi-team enterprise platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and scale fundamentals
